title: Deyaah 40cm Mini Christmas Tree with Lights, Desktop Christmas Tree, Battery Powered Tabletop Christmas Tree for Christmas Holiday Table Decor (Red)
features: Features:The mini Christmas tree with lights adds a touch of warmth and comfort to your Christmas Eve; with LED string lights, battery-powered (not included in the package) to light up your Christmas Eve for you and your family Warm and festive atmosphere.

Size:Christmas Tree Ornaments, Desktop Christmas Tree, 15.7" Tall. NOTE: Powered by 2 x AA Batteries(Not Included). Standing 40cm(15.7") tall and 18 x 18cm(7" x 7") at it's widest, this tree is the perfect way to bring some compact cheer anywhere you want it.

Easy to Using and Store:When using, take it out of the box and place it on the desktop,Built-in battery-powered warm white light,no plugs or wires needed with long-lasting battery-operated LED bulbs,(batteries not included).When you have finished using it, just save it and you can reuse it year after year.

Good Christmas Decorations: Mini Christmas tree is very suitable as a Christmas gift for your lover, friends, and colleagues. It is great for indoor or outdoor desk Christmas decoration for adding holiday cheer to living space. Christmas is everyone's favorite holiday! Wishing you have all the Christmas blessings.

The best decorations:Suitable for shopping mall counters, product counters, family gatherings, Christmas tree office decorations, photography props, reflecting the festive atmosphere, can be placed on the dining table, dining table or desk and other places in any cottage Christmas is very bright, absolutely It is a unique and beautiful scenery.
description: Made of flame-retardant PVC material Add atmosphere to your family gathering The countertop is decorated with Christmas trees and Christmas decorations Small and easy to carry Suitable for adding a holly-like holiday to your home or office Spec: Material: PVC, iron wire Color: red/gold/silver Size: 40cm Battery type: 2 x AA batteries (not included) Scope of application: Christmas tree decoration on the countertop and Christmas day decoration. Package List: 1*Mini Christmas tree
